name: Interpretation Assistant Agent
description: Selects and runs AI/CAD tools for a study and surfaces findings with evidence references; each finding reports its level of reality (pixel model, referral-reason rule, or stub).

skills.name: Run interpretation tools
skills.description: Selects tools by study type, runs them (pneumothorax-detect is a real pixel model; the rest are referral-reason rules or stubs), returns structured findings.
